articles.author: Ivan Mehta
articles.title: reMarkable’s new Paper Pure tablet goes back to basics with a monochrome screen - TechCrunch
articles.description: The new Paper Pure is lighter and faster than the reMarkable 2, which is going to be retired six years since its launch.
articles.content: After exploring the bigger market for productivity tablets featuring color displays with the Paper Pro and the smaller Paper Pro Move, E Ink tablet maker reMarkable is returning to its roots with a n… [+2462 chars]
